name: @v5x/web
description: Browser workflow layer for VEX V5 Web Serial applications

scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:dts && bun run build:esm
scripts.build:esm: bun run build:esm:core && bun run build:esm:testing && bun run build:esm:react && bun run build:esm:svelte && bun run build:esm:solid
scripts.build:esm:react: bun build ./src/react/index.ts --target browser --format esm --sourcemap=linked --outdir ./dist/react --entry-naming=index.js --external @v5x/serial --external neverthrow --external react
scripts.build:esm:svelte: bun build ./src/svelte/index.ts --target browser --format esm --sourcemap=linked --outdir ./dist/svelte --entry-naming=index.js --external @v5x/serial --external neverthrow --external svelte --external svelte/reactivity
scripts.build:esm:solid: bun build ./src/solid/index.tsx --target browser --format esm --sourcemap=linked --outdir ./dist/solid --entry-naming=index.js --external @v5x/serial --external neverthrow --external solid-js --external solid-js/web --jsx-import-source solid-js --jsx-runtime automatic
scripts.prepack: bun run --cwd ../serial build && bun run build && bun ../../scripts/add-dom-serial-references.ts dist

author: qainguin <slimaster14@gmail.com>
